name: Mixup
description: Chainable stereo utility mixer. Two mono mutable channels, one mutable stereo channel, one unity-gain auxiliary stereo input. Rear-panel 3-pin Link bus chains multiple Mixups or connects to Intellijel audio jack boards.

controls.name: LEVEL 1
controls.description: Attenuates mono IN 1 sent to both MIX L and MIX R.

controls.name: LEVEL 2
controls.description: Attenuates mono IN 2 to both MIX L and MIX R.

controls.name: LEVEL 3
controls.description: Shared attenuator for stereo inputs IN 3L and IN 3R.
controls.detail: Single knob controls both sides of the stereo pair

controls.name: MUTE 1
controls.description: Toggles IN 1 on/off. Down position removes it from the mix.
controls.detail: AC-coupled path suppresses clicks when toggling

controls.name: MUTE 3
controls.description: Mutes both IN 3L and IN 3R simultaneously.
controls.detail: Single switch handles the stereo pair

inputs.name: IN 1
inputs.description: Mono audio input 1, routed to both L and R mix busses, level and mute controlled

inputs.name: IN 2
inputs.description: Mono audio input 2, routed to both L and R mix busses

inputs.name: IN 3L
inputs.description: Left side of stereo input 3; acts as mono-to-both if IN 3R is unpatched
inputs.normalizedTo: mono-sums to MIX L and MIX R when IN 3R unpatched

inputs.name: IN 4L
inputs.description: Unity-gain auxiliary stereo left input — no level, no mute
inputs.normalizedTo: mono-sums to MIX L and MIX R when IN 4R unpatched

inputs.name: IN 4R
inputs.description: Unity-gain auxiliary stereo right input — no level, no mute

inputs.name: CHAIN-IN
inputs.description: Rear-panel 3-pin Link input — receives L/R mix bus from another Mixup, Stereo Mix 1U, or Intellijel audio jack board

outputs.name: MIX L
outputs.description: Summed left output: IN 1, IN 2, IN 3L, IN 4L plus any signal received via CHAIN-IN

outputs.name: MIX R
outputs.description: Summed right output: IN 1, IN 2, IN 3R (or IN 3L if 3R unpatched), IN 4R (or IN 4L), plus CHAIN-IN

outputs.name: CHAIN-OUT
outputs.description: Rear-panel 3-pin Link output — taps L/R mix bus for chaining into another Mixup or directly to Intellijel case audio jacks

behaviors.name: Clip LED Warning
behaviors.description: Single LED between MIX L and MIX R lights when either bus clips. Chaining multiple Mixups makes overdrive more likely — drop LEVEL knobs when it lights.

behaviors.name: Mono Normalization on Stereo Inputs
behaviors.description: IN 3L and IN 4L each act as mono inputs summed to both L and R busses when their right partner is empty. Plug one cable for mono centre placement; add a second for true stereo.

behaviors.name: Chainable via Rear Link
behaviors.description: 3-pin Link bus carries stereo mix to another Mixup, a Stereo Mix 1U, Outs module, v2 Headphones 1U, or directly to case audio jacks on Palette / 7U cases. Six jacks effectively grow to sixteen across two cascaded Mixups.

behaviors.name: Unity-Gain Aux Input
behaviors.description: IN 4 has no level knob and no mute — a permanent always-on stereo return, ideal for a reverb/delay return or a DAW line that should never accidentally drop out.

behaviors.name: Audio-Only AC Coupling
behaviors.description: Unlike DC-coupled utility mixers, Mixup is AC-coupled and designed for audio. Do not use it to sum CV — offsets will be filtered out and muting will click less but CV won't pass cleanly.

behaviors.name: Headphones 1U Jumper Removal
behaviors.trigger: chaining into Outs or v2 Headphones 1U
behaviors.description: When Link-chaining into an Intellijel Outs module or v2 Headphones 1U, the destination module's JP1 jumper must be removed — Mixup already handles the L/R normaling internally.

patchIdeas.name: Basic 4-voice stereo submix
patchIdeas.patch: Drum bus mono into IN 1 · bass mono into IN 2 · synth stereo into IN 3L/3R · pad stereo into IN 4L/4R (always on) · MIX L/R to output · mute bass or drum drops with switches
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mixup:
* LEVEL 1-3 set · IN 4 unity

- Drums (Out) -> Mixup (IN 1)
- Bass (Out) -> Mixup (IN 2)
- Synth L (Out) -> Mixup (IN 3L)
- Synth R (Out) -> Mixup (IN 3R)
- Pad L (Out) -> Mixup (IN 4L)
- Pad R (Out) -> Mixup (IN 4R)
- Mixup (MIX L) -> Output (L)
- Mixup (MIX R) -> Output (R) // 4-voice stereo mix

patchIdeas.name: Chain two Mixups for 12+ inputs
patchIdeas.patch: First Mixup handles drums + synths · CHAIN-OUT of Mixup 1 into CHAIN-IN of Mixup 2 · Mixup 2 handles pads + FX returns · final MIX L/R on Mixup 2 sums everything · watch the clip LED on the downstream unit
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mixup 1:
* Drums + synths patched
Mixup 2:
* Pads + FX returns patched

- Mixup 1 (CHAIN-OUT) -> Mixup 2 (CHAIN-IN)
- Mixup 2 (MIX L) -> Output (L)
- Mixup 2 (MIX R) -> Output (R) // 12 inputs across two mixers

patchIdeas.name: FX return with mute pre-fader
patchIdeas.patch: Dry voice into IN 1 · send to external reverb · reverb return stereo to IN 3L/3R · MUTE 3 kills only the wet tail without affecting the dry voice on IN 1 · drop-out fills on performance mute
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mixup:
* LEVEL 1 noon · LEVEL 3 low

- Voice (Out) -> Mixup (IN 1)
- Voice (Out) -> Reverb (In)
- Reverb (L) -> Mixup (IN 3L)
- Reverb (R) -> Mixup (IN 3R)
- Mixup (MIX L) -> Output (L)
- Mixup (MIX R) -> Output (R) // mute wet only

patchIdeas.name: Direct to Palette case jacks
patchIdeas.patch: CHAIN-OUT on Mixup rear to the 3-pin Link connector on a Palette case · front-panel audio jacks on the case now output Mixup's MIX L/R at modular level · saves front-panel HP · pair with Stereo Out 1U if feeding consumer gear
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mixup:
* Internal routing to MIX bus

- Sources (Out) -> Mixup (IN 1-4)
- Mixup (CHAIN-OUT) -> Palette Case (Link) // direct to case jacks

patchIdeas.name: Always-on monitor input on IN 4
patchIdeas.patch: DAW line or phone into IN 4L/4R (unity gain, no mute) · modular voices on IN 1-3 with their own mutes · performer can mute all modular channels simultaneously and IN 4 keeps monitoring audio playing · useful for jam-along or click track
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mixup:
* IN 1-3 mutable · IN 4 unity always-on

- Click Track (L) -> Mixup (IN 4L)
- Click Track (R) -> Mixup (IN 4R)
- Voice 1 (Out) -> Mixup (IN 1)
- Voice 2 (Out) -> Mixup (IN 2)
- Mixup (MIX L) -> Output (L)
- Mixup (MIX R) -> Output (R) // click survives mutes
